where.if: AND (l.req_ip LIKE '%'||#{kw}||'%' OR l.user_id LIKE '%'||#{kw}||'%' OR l.error_type LIKE '%'||#{kw}||'%')

mapper.select:
SELECT /* base.sy :: SyhAccessErrorLogMapper :: selectPageList */ l.log_id , l.req_method , l.req_host , l.req_path , l.req_query , l.req_ip , l.req_ua , l.user_type_cd , l.user_id , l.role_id , l.dept_id , l.vendor_id , l.locale_id , l.resp_time_ms , l.error_type , l.error_msg , l.stack_trace , l.ui_nm , l.cmd_nm , l.file_nm , l.func_nm , l.line_no , l.trace_id , l.server_nm , l.profile , l.thread_nm , l.logger_nm , l.log_dt , l.reg_date FROM shopjoy_2604.syh_access_error_log l
ORDER BY l.log_dt DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(l.*) /* base.sy :: SyhAccessErrorLogMapper :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.syh_access_error_log l
